### Before submitting a new issue...

comments.author: yuekaizhang
comments.body: @hsliuustc0106 @linyueqian  I would like to support the newly released Audex. Could you please assign this task to me?

comments.author: linyueqian
comments.body: we also noticed this model. yes, please go ahead!

comments.author: hsliuustc0106
comments.body: this model looks great

comments.author: Sy0307
comments.body: This model looks promising and maybe we can split it into some parts to support(for basic function & perf). Thoughts? @yuekaizhang

comments.author: yuekaizhang
comments.body:
> This model looks promising and maybe we can split it into some parts to support(for basic function & perf). Thoughts? [@yuekaizhang](https://github.com/yuekaizhang)

@Sy0307  I'm currently working on basic function support #4976. Once it's ready, perhaps you could assist with performance improvements if you're interested.

comments.author: linyueqian
comments.body: sounds good! please ping us once it is ready to review

title: [New Model]: nvidia/Nemotron-Labs-Audex 30B-A3B, 2B
